name: health-monitor

payload.message:
Run a quick health check:

1. Gateway status:
   exec: openclaw gateway status 2>&1 | head -5

2. Ollama status (if using local models):
   exec: curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/tags 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'Models loaded: {len(d.get(\"models\",[])))}')"

3. Recent cron errors (last hour):
   exec: find /tmp/openclaw -name '*.log' -newer /tmp/health-marker 2>/dev/null | head -3

If everything is healthy, respond with just: ✅ All systems operational

If something is wrong, describe the issue clearly.

Do NOT use the message tool.

_comment: Silent health check. Set delivery.mode to 'announce' if you want Telegram alerts on failures. Uses smallest local model to minimize resource usage.
